calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-31-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
No appearance by the Defendant: Perry Smith.
Plaintiff's witness: Theresa Flores, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Rental Agreement------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Five-day Notice-------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 34 Turk St., #332, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $870.00
Attorney's Fees $270.00
Costs is waived, for a total of $1,140.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

P.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Continued To Jan-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-31-2005 Assigned To Trial Court
